About Me

Skills, Experience & Certifications

Mitul Panchal

Lead Data Engineer

Lead Data Engineer with 7+ years of experience designing enterprise data platforms, real-time pipelines, and data-driven APIs. Deep expertise in Azure, Databricks, and Lakehouse architecture. Currently at ICICI Lombard (BFSI) — automating complex processes, reducing costs, and owning analytics platforms at scale. Outside work I enjoy football, gaming, and exploring new tech.

Experience & Education

ICICI Lombard General Insurance

Sep 2022 — Present

Mumbai — BFSI Domain

Lead Data Engineer · Apr 2025 – Present
Senior Data Engineer · Apr 2024 – Mar 2025
Senior Developer · Sep 2022 – Mar 2024
  • Led development of enterprise Data Lake & real-time integration platform on Azure + Databricks.
  • Automated OAF regulatory calculation — reduced processing time from 7 days to ~2 days, enabling daily, MTD & YTD refresh.
  • Designed ingestion architecture for 30+ sources with Bronze/Silver medallion layers.
  • Built Customer Eligibility API: CDC datasets → Cosmos DB → Azure Function APIs for mobile apps.
  • Migrated scoring from batch (15-min) to near real-time across 9 business features with OCR validation.
  • Databricks platform owner — 50+ user workspace, Unity Catalog & cost governance.

Nov 2018 — Sep 2022

Mumbai — System Engineer / Assistant System Engineer

  • Data & application support using SQL for data correction and reconciliation.
  • Enhanced a shared C# logging framework across multiple production applications.
  • Implemented ELK Stack for centralized log monitoring and analytics.
  • Transitioned to Data Analytics — built ETL pipelines using Python and Market EDM.
  • Migrated legacy ETL jobs to a .NET Core-based framework.
